title: salvia lanata
intro: Salvia lanata, also known as woolly sage or woolly salvia, is a perennial herb that belongs to the mint family and is native to the Mediterranean region. The medicinal properties of Salvia lanata include its ability to act as an antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial agent, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Salvia lanata include its potential to reduce stress, improve cognitive function, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. Salvia lanata can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal properties, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
